_layout_notes: Shriram ships two related workbooks per month:

1. 'MAR'YY BROKER GRID.xlsx' — main 4W/CV/PCV grid plus 2W companion sheets (NB / Rollover) plus reference sheets (Declined RTOs, PAN India, Metro RTO, Zone, Declined vehicle, TW decline make model, NM grid).
2. '2W Bundle grid.xlsx' — standalone copy of the 'New Business - 2W' sheet for circulation to 2W desks.
Both books share identical headers, so the same engine handles them.
Reference / declined-list sheets are NOT parsed into rate_rules (they're informational); a follow-up RTO-decline integration can pick them up later.
